title: Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack
description: Gives you the real Pokémon feeling in Cobblemon!
body:
# Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack 1.20.1 / 1.21.1
With this small resource pack the Pokémon are harder to see in the wild because they wander between the different grasses, like in the world of Pokémon.

## **Info**
I created these grass textures from scratch,  
the minecraft (short) grass replacement texture is highly inspired by  
the tall grass from Pokémon FireRed & LeafGreen,  
and the minecraft tall grass replacement texture is highly inspired by  
the long grass from Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire & Emerald.  


## **This pack includes/replaces**
- [(Short) Grass](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Short_Grass)
- [Tall Grass](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Tall_Grass)

## **Optional Dependencies**
- [Cobblemon](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cobblemon)
  
## **To-do**
- _~~Polish the textures.~~_ _(Done 28/12/2024)_

## **Contact**
_**Discord: WizzStar**_\
You can contact me for issues, but also requests and/or ideas.
